UNITED STATES SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION
FORM 8-K
CURRENT REPORT

Trading Symbol: POWL
Title of each class: Common Stock, $0.01 par value per share
Name of each exchange on which registered: The NASDAQ Global Select Market

Item 1.01 Entry into a Material Definitive Agreement.
Item 8.01 Other Events.

On May 6, 2026, Powell Industries, Inc. (the "Company") announced that
it has been awarded the largest order in company history, valued at over
$400 million, for the first phase of a multi-year, multi-gigawatt
behind-the-meter power infrastructure project supporting greenfield
AI data center buildouts being constructed for a major U.S. technology
company.

The order encompasses Powell's integrated switchgear, modular power
distribution, and data center power systems. The customer is a leading
hyperscaler and the project is expected to span multiple phases through
fiscal 2028.

The Company expects this contract to increase its commercial and industrial
backlog by approximately 22%, bringing total backlog to approximately
$1.8 billion. The Company is evaluating $70-100 million in capital
expenditures to expand production capacity to meet the demand.

This represents a transformational multi-year agreement that positions
Powell as a preferred supplier for AI infrastructure power systems.

Item 9.01 Financial Statements and Exhibits.

99.1 Press Release dated May 6, 2026.
